meaning: old-style money shop (a type of private bank that first appeared in th
sentence: 以前没有银行，大家都去钱庄存钱。
pinyin: Yǐqián méiyǒu yínháng, dàjiā dōu qù qián zhuāng cún qián.
english: Before banks existed, everyone used to deposit their money at old-style money shops.

meaning: older brother's wife; sister-in-law; elder sister (respectful appellat
sentence: 大嫂做的红烧肉味道特别好。
pinyin: Dà sǎo zuò de hóngshāo ròu wèidao tèbié hǎo.
english: My sister-in-law's braised pork is absolutely delicious.

sentence: 法院对该公司处以惩罚性赔偿金。
pinyin: Fǎyuàn duì gāi gōngsī chǔyǐ chéng fá xìng péichángjīn.
english: The court ordered the company to pay punitive damages.

meaning: two chambers (of legislative assembly), e.g. House of Representatives
sentence: 该法案需要经过两院投票才能通过。
pinyin: Gāi fǎ'àn xūyào jīngguò liǎng yuàn tóupiào cái néng tōngguò.
english: The bill needs to pass a vote in both chambers before it can become law.

sentence: 你可以选择任一颜色，都可以。
pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ xuǎnzé rèn yī yánsè, dōu kěyǐ.
english: You can choose any color you like — either one is fine.
